column26:
Prioritizes SSI Discretionary Non-Medical Redeterminations; maximizes overpayment preventions and recoveries leading to greater programmatic overpayment preventions and recoveries compared to random selection of cases for non-medical redetermination.? 

Discretionary redeterminations are conducted at scheduled intervals (typically every 1 to 6 years) to review a recipient’s nonmedical SSI eligibility factors (for example, income, resources, living arrangements) to determine whether the recipient is still eligible for SSI and is receiving the correct payment amount. By contrast, non-discretionary redeterminations are triggered by significant life changes (for example, turning 18 years of age, marriage).

Redeterminations are distinct from disability reviews, which focus solely on the medical qualifications of individuals receiving benefits.

column9: SSA uses a survey system to deliver and manage customer surveys. Part of the deployed system includes an AI capability for performing text analytics for identifying and tracking customer sentiments and key trends.
column10: The AI-powered text analytics capability within SSA’s survey system helps the agency better understand customer experiences by analyzing unstructured feedback. It outputs sentiment ratings, categorized themes, suggested actions, customer effort indicators, and translated text. These insights enable early detection of emerging trends and provide a clearer view of positive and negative drivers in customer interactions, supporting more responsive and informed service improvements for the public.
column11:
Survey analysis tool that evaluates sentiment and categorization.
Current capabilities include: 
1. Machine Translation - using algorithms to automatically translate text from one language to another
2. Sentiment Analysis - classifies text into negative, positive and neutral sentiment
3. Categorization - system-generated groupings of conceptually-related words and phrases based on phrase-level feedback
4. Suggested Actions - uncovers explicit suggestions from feedback text
5. Customer Effort - aimed to recover explicit mentions of effort in feedback text
